description: Pre-career education: University or Military Academy. Mongoose Traveller 2e, core rulebook pp. 11-12 (best-effort reconstruction — verify cash values, skill lists, and targets against your own copy of the rulebook).

university.name: University
university.blurb: Four years of academic study. Higher EDU, a few free skills, and a chance at Honours for real bragging rights.

on_graduation.note: Choose 2 skills at level 1 from the University skill list.

on_honours.note: Graduated with Honours. DM+1 on first career qualification roll.

on_failure.note: Failed graduation. Keeps the +1 EDU from enrollment, no other bonuses.

military_academy.name: Military Academy
military_academy.blurb: Three years of hell. Qualify and graduate and you start your service career as a commissioned officer (Rank 1) — plus skills and a DM+1 to that career's first advancement check.

on_graduation.note: Starts chosen service career as a commissioned officer (Rank 1). DM+1 to next advancement roll.

on_honours.note: Graduated with Honours. Starts chosen service career commissioned at Rank 1 with DM+2 to next advancement.

on_failure.note: Failed to graduate. Keeps enrollment skills but starts service career at Rank 0 (no commission bonus).
